author: SantiMod
content:
@here Roadmap Update: February 18, 2022  

DAO
    - Low fidelity prototyping is on going
Polish
    - Improved marketplace wireframes are being built
Showroom
    - All proxy mesh and layout finalized and transitioning to alpha pass on full int/ext showroom areas.
    - NFT poster display cycling system mocked up

  Here are a few Showroom sneak peaks:
